recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Here Comes the Boom
recommendations.overview: A high school biology teacher moonlights as a mixed-martial arts fighter in an effort to raise money to save the school's music program.

recommendations.title: The Chaos Class Failed the Class
recommendations.overview: A young and beautiful female teacher starts working in an all boys high school.

recommendations.title: Deadpool
recommendations.overview: The origin story of former Special Forces operative turned mercenary Wade Wilson, who, after being subjected to a rogue experiment that leaves him with accelerated healing powers, adopts the alter ego Deadpool. Armed with his new abilities and a dark

recommendations.title: Next Sohee
recommendations.overview: A female detective investigates the cause of a high school girl’s death and uncovers a disturbing truth.

recommendations.title: Fist Fight
recommendations.overview: When one school teacher gets the other fired, he is challenged to an after-school fight.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man

recommendations.title: Fist of Legend
recommendations.overview: Chen returns to his school when he finds out that his martial arts teacher has died. When he learns that his school students are harassed by some hooligans, he gears himself up to save them.

recommendations.title: Expelled
recommendations.overview: Felix is a legendary prankster who gets expelled from his high school and, with his friend’s help, stops at nothing to hide it from his parents.
